title: Big payment names back new stablecoin
snippet: Visa, Mastercard, US Bank, Google and Coinbase are among dozens of firms backing Open USD, a new stablecoin slated to launch later this year.

title: Visa and Google Sign on to Use Money Movement Stablecoin OpenUSD
message_html: Visa and Google Sign on to Use Money Movement Stablecoin OpenUSD ...
snippet: Several of the world’s payments and tech giants have agreed to use the money movement stablecoin Open USD. That coin is set to go live later this year, according to an announcement Tuesday (June 30) from Open Standard, the company behind Open USD. It noted in a blog post that the launch is happening

title: Circle shares drop 13% after launch of new stablecoin Open USD backed by major banks and tech firms
